column2: concs200 = concs # make a copy of our data table to work in
index = which(!(concs$extraction_id %in% (already_good$extraction_id))) # find indicies of extractions where we'd need a new dilution plan to fit into 200ul strip tubes
concs200[index, "final_vol_ul"] = 190 # set final vol of dilution, 200ul - 10ul for headspace
# for extractions with these indices, find volume of original extraction we need to make a 2ng/ul dilution with a final vol of 190ul
concs200[index, "ul_original_into_final"] = v1(2.01, # a little more than 2, so rounding errors don't push the final concentrations below 2
